The '''Interplanetary Ion Cannon''' was a much larger version of [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]' [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|v-150 anti-orbital]] [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]].

==Description==
The Interplanetary Ion Cannon was able to target [[Planet/Legends|planets]] at interstellar ranges, and its ion beams could vaporize a terrestrial planet's atmosphere.<ref name="Death Star Designer" />

{{Weapon-stub}}

==History==
The Interplanetary Ion Cannon was a proposed weapons system for the then-in-development [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="Death Star Designer" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Death Star Designer]]''
